channel.title: Seminar Schools — Toronto Festivals
channel.description: Toronto-GTA festivals passing the polymyth-broadened test.

item.title: Toronto Reel Asian Film Festival 2026 — Online Programme (Nov 16-29)
item.description: Toronto Reel Asian International Film Festival 30th anniversary edition November 11-21 in person in downtown Toronto and November 16-29, 2026 online across Canada.

item.title: A Year with Frog and Toad (Shaw Festival 2026 holiday)
Toronto Reel Asian International Film Festival 2026 (30th Anniversary)
item.description: Toronto Reel Asian International Film Festival enters its 30th anniversary edition November 11-21 in person in downtown Toronto and November 16-29, 2026 online across Canada.

item.title: Toronto International Festival of Authors (TIFA) 2026
item.description: Toronto International Festival of Authors 2026. Wed, Oct 28 5:00pm at Victoria University North Quad. MARK YOUR CALENDARS! 2026 Festival Dates. Pre-festival: Matt Haig (June 10 Glenn Gould Studio), Maggie O'Farrell (June 28 TIFF Lightbox), R.F. Kuang (Sept 22 Winter Garden Theatre).

item.title: Sunday Best: An exhibition of Black style and self-fashioning
Nuit Blanche Toronto 2026 — Tomorrow's Memories (20th Anniversary)
item.description: Returns October 3, 2026. Toronto's free all-night celebration of contemporary art transforms public spaces from 7 p.m. on October 3 to 7 a.m. on October 4. Theme: Tomorrow's Memories. 20th anniversary edition.

item.title: Nuit Blanche 2026 — Tomorrow's Memories (City-Wide Art Night)
item.description: Tomorrow's Memories — looks back to artists, curators, communities and places that defined Nuit Blanche and hold its histories. 7pm Oct 3 to 7am Oct 4, 2026. 20th anniversary.

item.title: Nuit Blanche Toronto 2026 (20th anniversary, 'Tomorrow's Memories')
item.description: 20th-anniversary edition. Theme: Tomorrow's Memories. 7 PM Oct 3 through 7 AM Oct 4.

item.title: TIFA Presents: An Evening with R.F. Kuang
item.description: TIFA Presents An Evening with R.F. Kuang. Tuesday, September 22 at 7:30 PM at Winter Garden Theatre.

item.title: Roncesvalles Polish Festival 2026 (20th Anniversary)
item.description: September 19th & 20th, 2026. 20th anniversary celebration. Saturday 11:00 AM to 11:00 PM. Sunday 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM. Free admission. Polish diasporic cultural festival in Roncesvalles Village.

item.title: Supercrawl 2026 (17th edition)
item.description: 17th anniversary edition of the James Street North arts festival.

item.title: Toronto International Film Festival 2026 (TIFF, 51st)
item.description: 51st edition of TIFF.

item.title: Toronto Buskerfest 2026
item.description: Sept 4-7, 2026 - WOODBINE PARK. Friday Sept 4: 4pm-11pm. Saturday Sept 5: Noon-11pm. Sunday Sept 6: Noon-10pm. Monday Sept 7: Noon-7pm. Admission by donation to Epilepsy Toronto.

item.title: TIFF — Toronto International Film Festival 2026
item.description: [Official site tiff.net returned HTTP 403 during automated crawl. TIFF annual fixture since 1976, typically first two weeks of September. Pattern: 2024 Sept 5-15; 2025 Sept 4-14; 2026 est. Sept 3-13. Confirmed in September 2026 by multiple aggregators. Programming not extractable from official site.]

item.title: Melissa Auf der Maur: My '90s Photographs
FAN EXPO Canada — Frank Miller: Batman The Dark Knight Returns
item.description: Meet Frank Miller at FAN EXPO Canada and walk away with autographs, exclusive Batman: The Dark Knight Returns collectibles, and even a personalized sketch. August 27-30, 2026.

item.title: FAN EXPO Canada 2026
item.description: August 27-30, 2026 at Metro Toronto Convention Centre. ~135,000 attendees. Headline guests: The Hobbits (Lord of the Rings) once-in-a-generation celebration; Frank Miller; Joe Quesada; Colin O'Donoghue VIP Meet & Greet Aug 29. Comics, sci-fi, horror, anime, gaming, cosplay.

item.title: FAN EXPO Canada — The Hobbits Reunion (Lord of the Rings Cast Q&A)
item.description: Get ready to meet Frodo, Sam, Merry, and Pippin for a once-in-a-generation celebration. FAN EXPO Canada August 27-30, 2026 at Metro Toronto Convention Centre.

item.title: CNE — Canadian National Exhibition 2026
item.description: AUGUST 21 - SEPTEMBER 7, 2026. Bell SOUNDSTAGE at the Bandshell: Early Lineup Announced. Landmark music partnership with NXNE in 2026. SuperDogs, Air Show, Ice Skating & Acrobatic Show. Buy CNE Advance Sale Tickets Today.

item.title: Toronto Folk Music Festival 2026
item.description: The 2026 festival will take place August 21st, 22nd & 23rd on Ward's Island at the WIA Pavilion located at 20 Withrow St.

item.title: AFROFEST 2026
item.description: Annual African music and cultural festival at Woodbine Park.

item.title: Afrofest 2026
item.description: [afrofest.ca confirms 2026 edition in planning (vendor applications open, AFROFEST 2026 SCHEDULE heading present) at Woodbine Park, Toronto. Specific dates not yet posted as of June 8, 2026. To Do Canada aggregator lists Aug 14-16. 2025 edition ran July 4-6 at Woodbine Park.]

item.title: Japan Festival Canada 2026 (JFC 2026)
item.description: [japanfestivalcanada.com confirms JFC 2026 in planning (JFCA 2026 banner, 2026 Sponsors section active). Specific dates not posted as of June 8, 2026. To Do Canada lists Aug 14-16, 2026 at Mississauga Celebration Square.]

item.title: TD Kitchener Blues Festival 2026
item.description: 35+ bands on 4 stages over 4 days. Fundraising concert Aug 6.

item.title: SummerWorks Performance Festival 2026
item.description: August 6-16, 2026. 30+ projects from local, national, and international performance makers. New Associate Artists program. Performances in multiple venues and diverse community spaces in Toronto's east and west ends.

item.title: Tandava (SummerWorks 2026)
item.description: Tandava by Nova Bhattacharya & Suvendrini Lena. Drawing on 6th century Tamil poetry, addresses justice for those disappeared during Sri Lanka's civil war. SummerWorks Aug 6-16, 2026.

item.title: Little White Room (SummerWorks 2026)
item.description: Little White Room by Amy Nostbakken, Norah Sadava & Vicky Araico. Three-woman multilingual multinational satire examining authoritarian systems and patriarchal forces. SummerWorks Aug 6-16, 2026.

item.title: Blood Brothers by Sheep's Clothing Theatre (SummerWorks 2026)
item.description: Blood Brothers by Sheep's Clothing Theatre (Brianna Russell & Catie Thorne). Free-roaming site-specific performance. SummerWorks Performance Festival Aug 6-16, 2026.

item.title: Toronto Caribbean Carnival — Grand Parade
item.description: Grand Parade August 1, 2026. The main event! Toronto Caribbean Carnival Grand Parade fills the city with colour, creativity, and Caribbean rhythm.

item.title: Caribana Grand Parade
item.description: Grand Parade 8 AM to 8 PM along Lakeshore.

item.title: Toronto Caribbean Carnival — OSA Toronto Panorama
item.description: OSA Toronto Panorama July 31, 2026 at Lamport Stadium. Annual steelband competition, Canada's top orchestras perform under the stars.

item.title: VELD Music Festival 2026
item.description: JULY 31, AUGUST 1-2 at DOWNSVIEW PARK. V Monogram 2026. VELD26-LINEUP announced. Tickets available through Frontgate Tickets.

item.title: Toronto Caribbean Carnival — King & Queen Showcase
item.description: King & Queen Showcase July 30, 2026 5pm-2am at Lamport Stadium. Carnival crown jewel, each Mas Band unveils larger-than-life costumes.

item.title: Toronto Caribbean Carnival 2026 (Caribana, 59th year)
item.description: North America's largest Caribbean carnival. 59th year. Grand Parade Aug 1.

item.title: BollywoodMonster Mashup 2026
item.description: Canada's largest Bollywood festival.

item.title: Beaches Jazz Festival — StreetFest
item.description: StreetFest July 23, 24 & 25 on Queen Street East. 38th Annual Beaches Jazz Festival July 3-26, 2026.

item.title: Johannes Linstead — From Spain to Cuba (Beaches Jazz Festival)
item.description: Johannes Linstead July 21 & 22 at Beaches United Church. 38th Annual Beaches Jazz Festival July 3-26, 2026.

item.title: Toronto Caribbean Carnival — Junior Carnival Parade
item.description: Junior Carnival Parade July 18, 2026. Family-friendly colourful costumed street parade.

item.title: Hillside Festival 2026
item.description: Three-day music festival at Guelph Lake Island. Shuttle from Guelph downtown.

item.title: Hamilton Fringe Festival 2026
item.description: Hamilton Fringe Festival. Shows begin July 16.

item.title: TD Salsa on St. Clair 2026
item.description: Toronto Latin Street Festival. Sat 11am-9:30pm, Sun 11am-8:30pm.

item.title: TD Festival of South Asia 2026 (24th edition)
TD Salsa on St. Clair 2026
item.description: [Official site salsaintoronto.com timed out during crawl. Dates confirmed by To Do Canada: TD Salsa On St. Clair July 11-12, St. Clair Avenue West. Annual Latin-diasporic street festival, Toronto summer fixture.]
